author: Авакумов Данил Эдуардович
objective: Implement packet validation, contradiction detection, and packet quality scoring so v2 never reasons over malformed or weakly specified inputs without explicit downgrade.
research_question: How should BDC CLI v2 quantify packet quality and expose contradictions before any architecture recommendation is produced?

execution_rules.phase_gate: May start only after TASK-7450 is SUCCESS.

tests_required: missing required fields produce deterministic errors
contradictory packet facts produce contradiction flags
weak evidence packets are downgraded to lower packet quality
validator emits machine-readable reports with no silent acceptance of malformed packets
